# Zscaler Asset Exposure Management (CAASM) | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/caasm
**Captured:** 2026-04-25 via WebFetch.

---

## Value Proposition

**Tagline:** "See all your assets. Fix your coverage gaps. Reduce your risk."

Asset Exposure Management delivers comprehensive visibility into organizational assets by creating a "golden record" — a unified, accurate, context-rich asset inventory. Addresses the core challenge that "security teams spend countless hours trying to piece together an accurate asset inventory with data from multiple disparate systems," resulting in incomplete inventories that compromise risk assessments.

## Key Statistics

- 133% annual increase in cyber assets (JupiterOne)
- 60–75 security tools per enterprise on average, each with siloed asset views (SiliconANGLE)
- Zscaler discovers **20–30% of assets missing from inventory** on average

## Core Capabilities

### Asset Visibility
- 150+ connectors in the Data Fabric for Security
- Multi-source entity deduplication
- Asset relationship identification (visually displayed)
- Golden Record creation by correlation

### Coverage Gap Identification
- Gap analysis (e.g., missing EDR)
- Data conflict resolution across tools
- Inactive asset recognition (decommissioning detection)
- Compliance status tracking (regulatory issues before audits)

### CMDB Health Management
- CMDB visibility (comprehensive asset registration)
- Missing-asset discovery (assets visible in network traffic but not in CMDB)
- Critical-detail completeness (domain, serial, owner, location, business unit)
- Scalable program management with automated CMDB updates

### Automated Remediation Actions
- CMDB enrichment (auto-update with missing assets/elements)
- Policy initiation (trigger built-in or custom access policies)
- Workflow creation via ticketing systems
- Task assignment to responsible owners

### Reporting & Analytics
- Pre-built report library
- Custom dashboard creation aligned to KPIs
- Compliance tracking by business unit / team / product / geography

## Data-Source Aggregation

The platform integrates **150+ connectors** within the Data Fabric for Security, enabling asset resolution across dozens of source systems. Continuous cross-source deduplication, correlation, and resolution achieve comprehensive visibility into endpoints, cloud resources, network devices, and other organizational assets.

## Integration with Zscaler Risk Platform

- **Risk360**: AEM informs more accurate risk quantification.
- **Unified Vulnerability Management (UVM)**: Accurate asset data enables vulnerability analysis with full context.
- **CTEM Programs**: AEM fuels end-to-end continuous threat and exposure management — "you can't secure what you can't see."

## Use Cases

1. Create a "golden record" of all organizational assets
2. Address asset coverage gaps (misconfigurations, missing controls)
3. Inform vulnerability prioritization with accurate asset context
4. Increase risk quantification accuracy across the attack surface
5. Drive effective CTEM programs with comprehensive asset visibility

## Platform Context

Asset Exposure Management is powered by the **Data Fabric for Security™** (Avalor acquisition lineage) — Zscaler's foundational architecture providing unified, AI-enhanced visibility across users, workloads, and devices via the world's largest inline security cloud.
